scope: Acquisition and preprocessing provenance for legally obtained public-proxy references. This record does not describe or redistribute hidden Kattis inputs.
common_evaluation_rule: The official evaluator profile applies no implicit transform. Canonical-pose records are measured in the stored reference frame. Rotation experiments apply the same rigid rotation to reference and candidate, then center and scale both from the rotated reference AABB center and maximum reference radius.

records.bibliographic_source: Stanford University Computer Graphics Laboratory 3D Scanning Repository
records.license_summary: Research use permitted with acknowledgement; free non-commercial mirroring and redistribution are permitted by the repository notice.
records.raw_hash_status: The original downloaded archive and its hash were not retained in the curated campaign artifact.
records.conversion_status: The historical PLY-to-modified-OBJ command was not retained; the canonical reference hash is the reproducibility boundary.
records.normalization_rule: AABB-center translation, maximum-radius unit scaling, coordinate rounding to 1e-9, lexicographic vertex ordering, cyclic-minimum face indexing, and lexicographic face ordering.
records.vertex_order_canonicalization: Lexicographic by x, then y, then z, then original index; faces rotate to their minimum index and are sorted lexicographically.
records.source_unit_or_scale: Stanford scanner scale upstream; unitless after maximum-radius normalization.

records.bibliographic_source: Stanford University Computer Graphics Laboratory 3D Scanning Repository
records.license_summary: Research use permitted with acknowledgement; free non-commercial mirroring and redistribution are permitted by the repository notice.
records.raw_hash_status: The original downloaded archive and its hash were not retained in the curated campaign artifact.
records.conversion_status: The exact cleaning and 35,292-vertex conversion command was not retained; the canonical reference hash and 16 rotation matrices are retained.
records.normalization_rule: The stored modified OBJ is already in the campaign's normalized frame; each stress rotation is subsequently centered and scaled from the rotated reference.
records.vertex_order_canonicalization: Stored order preserved for the controlled ablation.
records.source_unit_or_scale: Stanford scanner scale upstream; unitless in the stored normalized proxy.

records.bibliographic_source: Stanford University Computer Graphics Laboratory 3D Scanning Repository

records.raw_hash_status: The original downloaded archive and its hash were not retained in the curated campaign artifact.
records.conversion_status: The historical decimation and modified-OBJ conversion command was not retained; the canonical reference hash is retained.
records.normalization_rule: Stored canonical frame; the official evaluator profile applies no additional transform.
records.source_unit_or_scale: Stanford scan units upstream; normalized campaign coordinates in the canonical proxy.

records.license_summary: Acquired legally for the competition campaign; the upstream locator and redistribution terms were not retained, so the mesh is not redistributed.
records.raw_hash_status: No pre-conversion raw archive survives in the curated artifact.
records.conversion_status: Historical acquisition and conversion command not retained; this is disclosed rather than reconstructed from memory.
records.normalization_rule: Stored canonical frame; the official evaluator profile applies no additional transform.

records.bibliographic_source: Nora Al-Badri and Jan Nikolai Nelles, The Other Nefertiti
records.license_summary: Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 as stated by the upstream project.
records.raw_hash_status: The original downloaded ZIP and its hash were not retained in the curated campaign artifact.
records.conversion_status: The historical OBJ-to-modified-OBJ normalization command was not retained; exact vertex and face counts and the canonical reference hash are retained.
records.normalization_rule: Stored canonical frame; the official evaluator profile applies no additional transform.
records.source_unit_or_scale: Unknown upstream physical scale; unitless campaign coordinates.

limitations: Hashes bind every canonical reference used for the reported metrics, but the absence of several raw archive hashes and historical conversion commands prevents byte-for-byte reconstruction from upstream downloads alone. This limitation is explicit and is why meshes are user-supplied for Level C replication.
